raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track curves sharply right ahead (delta ≈ -42°), car is left of center heading south-southwest, continuing right steering to follow the track curving south toward waypoints 109-115.

Avoid oversteer oscillation on straights; use smallest valid angle when delta < 10°
